pitch_template: Independent Build A Ring Farm fan wiki: 51-seed database, mutation matrix, verified profit calculator, active codes & progression guides. Official Roblox game by Gamecreates — we are a player guide site, not the game.

platforms.name: Roblox Wikis Directory
platforms.notes: Email: wiki name, URL, covers seeds/mutations/codes/calculator. Site must be ≥1 month old.

platforms.name: Roblox Wiki - List of fan sites (Fandom)
platforms.notes: Community encyclopedia of Roblox fan sites; propose listing as independent BAR guide wiki.

platforms.name: AverGames
platforms.notes: Already has BAR calculators/seeds. Pitch buildaring.online as recommended full wiki partner link.

platforms.name: BloxToolbox
platforms.notes: Roblox tools, codes, guides hub. Request BAR game hub with link to external wiki.

platforms.name: Roblox Calc
platforms.notes: 26-game guide/calculator network. Submit as BAR guide resource page.

platforms.name: Roblox Database
platforms.notes: 700+ game wikis/codes pages. Request BAR wiki + codes companion listing.

platforms.name: Pro Game Guides
platforms.notes: Existing BAR guide article. Ask editor to add buildaring.online in resources box.

platforms.name: Beebom
platforms.notes: Codes article. Pitch 'Full wiki & profit calculator' sidebar link — not a game submission.

platforms.name: AllRobloxCodes
platforms.notes: Each game page has guide section. Request BAR page citing buildaring.online as deep wiki.

platforms.name: Build A Ring Farm Discord
platforms.notes: Wiki & Guide category. Offer community-maintained fan wiki link for pins/rules.

platforms.name: GameWikis WikiLookup (GitHub)
platforms.notes: Independent gaming wiki index. May require MediaWiki API — verify Next.js site eligibility first.

platforms.name: Gaming Wiki Network
platforms.notes: Affiliate status for websites about video games. Join Discord to apply.

platforms.name: Destructoid
platforms.notes: Pitch BAR codes guide; cite buildaring.online for seeds/mutations/calculator.

platforms.name: Game Codes Wiki
platforms.notes: Roblox codes wiki directory — list wiki as extended resource.

platforms.name: CodesRaid
platforms.notes: A–Z codes; add BAR with link to full strategy wiki.

platforms.name: BloxScribe
platforms.notes: Game guide page — add verified fan wiki in official links section.

platforms.name: build-a-ring-farm.wiki
platforms.notes: Peer fan wiki — reciprocal links / cite each other's databases.

platforms.name: buildaringfarm.app
platforms.notes: Peer wiki + calculator — cross-link seeds/codes pages.

platforms.name: buildaringplanner.com
platforms.notes: Peer planner wiki — link exchange on calculator methodology.

platforms.name: buildafarmfactory.wiki
platforms.notes: Different game but same genre — footer 'Other Roblox farm wikis' link swap.

platforms.name: Pillar of Gaming (Write for Us)
platforms.notes: Explicitly accepts Roblox guides. Write BAR progression piece linking to buildaring.online sections.

platforms.name: GamingDebugged (Write for Us)
platforms.notes: Guides and walkthroughs. Pitch 'Build A Ring Farm ring placement guide' with wiki links.

platforms.name: ThinkGamerZ (Write for Us)
platforms.notes: Roblox strategy/guide guest posts with 1–2 dofollow links allowed.

platforms.name: Roblox News Community Articles
platforms.notes: Submit tutorial/guide article about BAR mechanics with wiki link.

platforms.name: The Free Tools Directory
platforms.notes: Submit as 'Build A Ring Farm Profit Calculator' free web tool — link to /calculator.

platforms.name: Free Tool Arena
platforms.notes: 590 guides catalog — submit calculator + wiki guide pages if they accept external guides.

platforms.name: Roblox Developer Forum
platforms.notes: Share fan-made player wiki in Community Resources — not promotional spam.

platforms.name: Reddit r/roblox
platforms.notes: Post 'BAR resource roundup' when updates drop; link wiki sections.

platforms.name: YouTube BAR guide creators
platforms.notes: Email creators to add wiki + calculator links in video descriptions.

platforms.name: Video Game Site Webring
platforms.notes: Webring for game fan sites — add reciprocal link to vgw.io.

excluded.name: Dropnite Submit Game
excluded.reason: Requires Roblox game URL, not wiki

excluded.name: GamHub game submit
excluded.reason: Generic game website; low fit unless framed as guide site
